task: Browse the class schedule of graduate-level computer science courses.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully reached OSU's official Class Search page (classes.osu.edu), applied filters for graduate-level Computer Science & Engineering courses, and browsed the resulting schedule. Evidence shows the final filtered state included Subject: Computer Science & Engineering, Academic Career: Graduate, Campus: Columbus, Term: Autumn 2026, and Component: Lecture, with results visible on screen. The agent also extracted and summarized the graduate CSE course list from the official OSU class search/API. This satisfies the task to browse the class schedule of graduate-level computer science courses.
final_result_response:
I browsed OSU’s Class Search and filtered it to:

- Term: Autumn 2026
- Campus: Columbus
- Academic Career: Graduate
- Subject: Computer Science & Engineering
- Component: Lecture

That returns 76 lecture-section results, including 72 in-person and 4 distance-learning sections. <citation refs="fetch_call_q6mCv8ini96pqJVePex1HnGF|fc_0423afb2b7ac94ae016a0514cdcd2c819b8140adec6fc138ed#1">"totalItems\":76... \"Instruction Mode\"... \"In Person\"... \"count\":72... \"Distance Learning\"... \"count\":4"</citation>

- CSE 5022, Software I: Software Components
- CSE 5023, Software II: Software Development and Design
- CSE 5032, Foundations I: Discrete Structures
- CSE 5042, Systems I
- CSE 5194.01, Group Studies in CSE
- CSE 5231, Software Engineering Techniques

- CSE 5241, Introduction to Database Systems
- CSE 5321, Automata and Formal Languages
- CSE 5331, Foundations II: Data Structures and Algorithms
- CSE 5339, Intermediate Studies in Algorithms
- CSE 5341, Principles of Programming Languages
- CSE 5421, Introduction to Computer Architecture
- CSE 5431, Systems II: Intro to Operating Systems
- CSE 5471, Introduction to Cybersecurity
- CSE 5501, Social, Ethical, and Professional Issues in Computing
- CSE 5541, Computer Game and Animation Techniques
- CSE 5889, Intermediate Studies in Multidisciplinary Computing
- CSE 6331, Algorithms
- CSE 6341, Foundations of Programming Languages
- CSE 6421, Computer Architecture
- CSE 6429, Advanced Studies in Computer Architecture

- CSE 6891, Departmental Research Seminar

The class-search page is still open in the browser with these filters applied.
action_history: Opening OSU homepage: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.osu.edu/');
Searching OSU for class schedule: await page.locator('e99').click();
Searching OSU for class schedule: await page.locator('e2').click();
Submitting class schedule search: await page.locator('e101').fill('class schedule graduate computer science');
Submitting class schedule search: await page.locator('e102').click();
Opening OSU class search: const p2 = await openTab('https://classes.osu.edu/');
Searching for CSE graduate classes: await page.locator('e12').fill('CSE');
Searching for CSE graduate classes: await page.locator('e18').click();
Applying Computer Science & Engineering subject filter: await page.locator('e191').click();
Filtering to Columbus and Autumn 2026: await page.locator('e1562').click();
Filtering to Columbus and Autumn 2026: await page.getByRole('link', {name: /Autumn 2026/}).click();
Applying lecture filter and checking link: await page.locator('e2028').click();
Getting shareable filtered search link: await page.locator('e35').click();
